## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass.

- [ ] Public API has Google-style docstrings.
- [ ] Pandera schema and TypedDict updated together if return types changed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`.
